purpose: Define future explicit authorization requirements for direct repair eval execution without granting execution now.

future_checkpoint_identity.note: Checkpoint identity is recorded as a future planning string only. This branch does not load or inspect checkpoint contents.

authorization_policy.scope: Define future authorization requirements for evaluating direct_repair_001.
authorization_policy.critical_boundary: This policy does not grant eval execution, checkpoint reads, training, C export, public benchmark, promotion, or current-best overwrite.

future_authorization_requirements_before.name: explicit_checkpoint_read_authorization
future_authorization_requirements_before.criterion: A later branch must explicitly authorize reading checkpoint contents and name the checkpoint path.

future_authorization_requirements_before.name: explicit_model_eval_authorization
future_authorization_requirements_before.criterion: A later branch must explicitly authorize model eval execution and distinguish it from planning/dryrun.

future_authorization_requirements_before.name: exact_eval_command_review
future_authorization_requirements_before.criterion: A later branch must replace placeholder script/output paths with exact tracked or generated paths before any execution.

future_authorization_requirements_before.name: input_row_scope_lock
future_authorization_requirements_before.criterion: Eval scope must remain limited to direct_repair_001 unless a later branch explicitly expands scope.

future_authorization_requirements_before.name: quarantine_exclusion_lock
future_authorization_requirements_before.criterion: The six quarantined rows remain excluded from any eval input.

future_authorization_requirements_before.name: no_promotion_guard
future_authorization_requirements_before.criterion: Eval execution, if later authorized, must not imply promotion, C export, benchmark, checkpoint write, current-best overwrite, or model replacement.

future_authorization_requirements_before.name: result_handling_policy_required
future_authorization_requirements_before.criterion: A later branch must define how eval output would be recorded and reviewed without automatic promotion.

explicitly_disallowed_in_this_branch: Do not overwrite original manifest artifacts.
